provenance.selection: Dafny-verified candidates that failed the official HumanEval oracle

cases.failure_mode: The balance after the last operation is excluded from the existential prefix range.

task_probes.requirement: Detect a balance below zero at any point, including after the last operation.

cases.failure_mode: The helper returns the final character instead of the longest palindromic suffix.

task_probes.requirement: Return the shortest palindrome beginning with the supplied string.

cases.failure_mode: Integer values are cast to raw code points instead of decimal digit characters.

task_probes.requirement: Use ordinary decimal numeral characters in the space-delimited result.
